# voluntarypetition.org

> Guide to filing a voluntary bankruptcy petition -- costs, requirements, and pre-filing steps.

voluntarypetition.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the voluntary bankruptcy petition process. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://voluntarypetition.org/: Overview of the voluntary petition -- starting your bankruptcy case
- https://voluntarypetition.org/filing-fees.html: Bankruptcy filing fees by chapter
- https://voluntarypetition.org/fee-waiver.html: Fee waiver for Chapter 7 -- eligibility and how to apply
- https://voluntarypetition.org/hidden-costs.html: Hidden costs of bankruptcy beyond the filing fee
- https://voluntarypetition.org/attorney-fees.html: Bankruptcy attorney fees -- what to expect and how to compare
- https://voluntarypetition.org/cost-of-not-filing.html: The cost of not filing bankruptcy -- garnishment, interest, lawsuits
- https://voluntarypetition.org/pre-filing.html: Pre-filing requirements -- credit counseling and document preparation
- https://voluntarypetition.org/debtor-education.html: Debtor education course -- the post-filing financial management requirement
- https://voluntarypetition.org/approved-providers.html: Approved credit counseling and debtor education providers
- https://voluntarypetition.org/exceptions.html: Exceptions to filing requirements

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
